error_sentence: She told me she go to the beach last week.
correct_sentence: She told me she went to the beach last week.
explanation: 从句中的动词时态与主句不匹配。

error_sentence: I started to study when I hear the news.
correct_sentence: I started to study when I heard the news.
explanation: 从句中的动词时态应与主句的时态一致。

error_sentence: They were talking about an event that will happen tomorrow.
correct_sentence: They were talking about an event that would happen tomorrow.
explanation: 虚拟语气中时态不匹配，应为过去将来时。

error_sentence: While he was waiting, he often think about his childhood.
correct_sentence: While he was waiting, he often thought about his childhood.
explanation: 从句中的动词时态应与主句的过去进行时一致。

error_sentence: I have been learning English since I began to study last year.
correct_sentence: I have been learning English since I began studying last year.
explanation: 现在完成进行时与过去开始的动作时态不匹配。

error_sentence: When she was a child, she use to play soccer.
correct_sentence: When she was a child, she used to play soccer.
explanation: 表达过去的习惯性动作时，use应改为used。

error_sentence: If I knew the answer, I tell you.
correct_sentence: If I knew the answer, I would tell you.
explanation: 条件句中主句应使用虚拟语气，即过去时。

error_sentence: The teacher explained that the Earth revolve around the Sun.
correct_sentence: The teacher explained that the Earth revolves around the Sun.
explanation: 与事实相关的陈述句，动词应使用一般现在时。

error_sentence: She said she will meet us at the library.
correct_sentence: She said she would meet us at the library.
explanation: 间接引语中应使用过去将来时态。

error_sentence: The book who I read is very interesting.
correct_sentence: The book that I read is very interesting.
explanation: 错误使用了疑问代词who，应使用关系代词that。

error_sentence: The movie which we watched last night was boring.
correct_sentence: The movie that we watched last night was boring.
explanation: 关系代词which通常不用在限制性定语从句中。

error_sentence: The man whom gave us the present is my uncle.
correct_sentence: The man who gave us the present is my uncle.
explanation: 关系代词whom用于限定性定语从句的宾语位置，但常用who代替。

error_sentence: The song that plays on the radio is my favorite.
correct_sentence: The song that is played on the radio is my favorite.
explanation: 关系副词that引导的定语从句中缺少了be动词。

error_sentence: The girl which she is my classmate is very smart.
correct_sentence: The girl who is my classmate is very smart.
explanation: 错误滥用关系代词which，应使用who指代人。

error_sentence: The house that we visited it last summer is for sale.
correct_sentence: The house that we visited last summer is for sale.
explanation: 错误地添加了代词it，使句子结构冗余。

error_sentence: The book that I bought yesterday is written by J.K. Rowling.
correct_sentence: The book which I bought yesterday is written by J.K. Rowling.
explanation: 错误地将限制性定语从句中的关系代词that换成了which。

error_sentence: The car which its color is red is mine.
correct_sentence: The car whose color is red is mine.
explanation: 错误地使用了代词its，应使用whose表所属关系。

error_sentence: The student that he studies very hard got the scholarship.
correct_sentence: The student who studies very hard got the scholarship.
explanation: 错误地使用了代词he，应使用关系代词who指代学生。

error_sentence: The pen which I bought is broken.
correct_sentence: The pen that I bought is broken.
explanation: 错误地使用了which，应使用that作为限制性定语从句的关系代词。

error_sentence: She and I was late for the meeting.
correct_sentence: She and I were late for the meeting.
explanation: 主语为复数，谓语动词应使用复数形式。

error_sentence: Each of the students are interested in the project.
correct_sentence: Each of the students is interested in the project.
explanation: Each作为主语时，谓语动词应与最近的名词一致。

error_sentence: The team is playing well this season.
correct_sentence: The team are playing well this season.
explanation: 集体名词作主语时，若强调个体，谓语动词用复数。

error_sentence: The family were watching television when I arrived.
correct_sentence: The family was watching television when I arrived.
explanation: Family作为集合名词，若作整体看待，谓语动词用单数。

error_sentence: The news is exciting.
correct_sentence: The news are exciting.
explanation: News指的是不同报道时，应视为复数，谓语动词用复数。

error_sentence: The police was investigating the crime scene.
correct_sentence: The police were investigating the crime scene.
explanation: Police作为集合名词，强调多个个体时，用复数。

error_sentence: She or he is coming to the party.
correct_sentence: She or he are coming to the party.
explanation: 以or连接的两个主语，在不确定具体哪一个时，谓语动词用复数。

error_sentence: There is many apples in the basket.
correct_sentence: There are many apples in the basket.
explanation: Many修饰可数名词复数，谓语动词应为复数形式。

error_sentence: Only I understood the problem then.
correct_sentence: Only then did I understand the problem.
explanation: 没有使用倒装结构，句子缺少强调效果

error_sentence: After finishing homework, he went to bed.
correct_sentence: Only after finishing homework did he go to bed.
explanation: 缺少倒装导致强调句式变形错误

error_sentence: Without water, we can't live.
correct_sentence: Without water, we cannot live.
explanation: 没有使用倒装结构，应该在否定副词后使用部分倒装

error_sentence: Never I have seen such a beautiful scene.
correct_sentence: Never have I seen such a beautiful scene.
explanation: 完全倒装位置错误，助动词应置于主语前

error_sentence: Not only he finished the project but also he helped others.
correct_sentence: Not only did he finish the project but also he helped others.
explanation: 并列句中第一个分句倒装，第二个分句未倒装

error_sentence: Seldom he comes to the party.
correct_sentence: Seldom does he come to the party.
explanation: 否定副词后应使用部分倒装，却未将助动词提前

error_sentence: Under no circumstances will we give up.
correct_sentence: Under no circumstances do we give up.
explanation: 此句应使用部分倒装，却使用了陈述句语序

error_sentence: Not until he arrived home did I realize the mistake.
correct_sentence: Not until he arrived home did I realize my mistake.
explanation: 代词使用错误，应指向自身，使用了第三人称单数

error_sentence: He likes music, but he don't like rock.
correct_sentence: Although he likes music, he doesn't like rock.
explanation: 使用了不恰当的连接词，应该用although来表达转折关系。

error_sentence: She is a student, and she works in the evening.
correct_sentence: She is a student, and she also works in the evening.
explanation: 此处应使用also来加强语气，而不是简单地用and。

error_sentence: I wanted to go to the cinema, but my friends didn't want to.
correct_sentence: I wanted to go to the cinema, but my friends preferred to stay at home.
explanation: 使用preferred to更精确表达朋友的选择，而不是简单的否定。

error_sentence: It's hot, so we stay inside.
correct_sentence: It's hot, so we stay inside rather than go out.
explanation: 正确使用rather than来表达对比，增强句子逻辑性。

error_sentence: They started early, and they finished late.
correct_sentence: They started early, yet they finished late.
explanation: 使用yet来表达开始和结束之间的时间跨度，增强意外性。

error_sentence: She finished her homework, and she went to bed.
correct_sentence: She finished her homework, so she went to bed.
explanation: 使用so来表达因果关系，说明做完作业是睡觉的原因。

error_sentence: The weather was bad, but we decided to go hiking.
correct_sentence: Despite the bad weather, we decided to go hiking.
explanation: 用despite来强调即使天气不好，我们还决定去徒步。

error_sentence: You can come, or you can stay at home.
correct_sentence: You can either come or stay at home.
explanation: 使用either...or...来表达两个选项，强调选择性。

error_sentence: I will go to the park, unless it rains.
correct_sentence: I will go to the park if it doesn't rain.
explanation: 应该使用if来引导条件状语从句，表示如果天气不下雨的假设。

error_sentence: He is a good student, because he studies hard.
correct_sentence: He is a good student since he studies hard.
explanation: 使用since来引导原因状语从句，表示因果关系。

error_sentence: He waits at the bus stop for two hours.
correct_sentence: He waits for two hours at the bus stop.
explanation: 介词at错误地放在了时间之前，应放在时间之后。

error_sentence: I will arrive in New York on next Monday.
correct_sentence: I will arrive in New York next Monday.
explanation: 表示将来时间的on被错误使用，next Monday前不需要介词。

error_sentence: She has a lot of books in English language.
correct_sentence: She has a lot of books in English.
explanation: 在这种情况下，language不需要介词in，直接用English即可。

error_sentence: He is looking for a job at foreign companies.
correct_sentence: He is looking for a job in foreign companies.
explanation: 在描述在公司内部的工作时，应使用in而不是at。

error_sentence: Do you agree with me at this opinion?
correct_sentence: Do you agree with me on this opinion?
explanation: 在表达同意某个观点时，应使用on而不是at。

error_sentence: Please turn off the light in you leave.
correct_sentence: Please turn off the light when you leave.
explanation: 介词错误，应使用when表示时间关系而不是in。

error_sentence: She is good to music.
correct_sentence: She is good at music.
explanation: 描述在音乐上擅长应该使用at而不是to。

error_sentence: I am very familiar of this city.
correct_sentence: I am very familiar with this city.
explanation: 描述对某事物熟悉应该使用with而不是of。

error_sentence: She is studying of Chinese history.
correct_sentence: She is studying Chinese history.
explanation: 在提到研究某个学科时，不应使用of，而是直接使用学科名称。

error_sentence: She is reading a book in library.
correct_sentence: She is reading a book in the library.
explanation: 特指某个图书馆时应该使用定冠词the

error_sentence: I like to swim in river.
correct_sentence: I like to swim in the river.
explanation: 特指河流时需要加定冠词the

error_sentence: I need buy a new bicycle.
correct_sentence: I need to buy a new bicycle.
explanation: 中国学生常将动词和不定式混淆。
